infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Nusantara Journey tracks your location in the background to notify you when you're near heritage sites, museums, and cultural landmarks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Nusantara Journey tracks your location in the background to notify you when you're near heritage sites, museums, and cultural landmarks.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nusantara Journey uses the camera so you can take photos and share them with Arjuna for cultural insights.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nusantara Journey uses the microphone for voice-to-text so you can speak your questions to Arjuna.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nusantara Journey accesses your photo library so you can share images with Arjuna for cultural analysis.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Nusantara Journey tracks your location in the background to notify you when you're near heritage sites and cultural landmarks.

plugins.photosPermission: Nusantara Journey accesses your photos so you can share images with Arjuna.
plugins.cameraPermission: Nusantara Journey uses the camera so you can take photos to share with Arjuna.

plugins.microphonePermission: Nusantara Journey uses the microphone for voice-to-text input.
